title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security.

title: Account Creation
content: To create an account, click the Sign Up button on the homepage.

title: Help Center
content: The Help Center contains frequently asked questions and troubleshooting guides.

title: Contact Support
content: Users can contact support by emailing support@example.com.

title: Update Profile
content: Users can update their profile information from the Profile Settings page.

title: Change Email
content: Users can change their email address from Account Settings.

title: Two Factor Authentication
content: Two factor authentication can be enabled from Security Settings.

title: Cancel Subscription
content: Users can cancel their subscription anytime from the Billing section.
